text: Edge case 1: Empty query sentinel token edge-empty-01 keeps deterministic behavior.

query: aurora

text: Edge case 4: Emoji payload ✅🚀 keeps unicode stable for edge-emoji-04.
query: emoji unicode

text: Edge case 5: Combining form café and precomposed café should both be searchable edge-unicode-05.
query: café

query: 東京会議

text: Edge case 7: Right-to-left sample مرحبا بالعالم with token edge-rtl-07.

text: Edge case 8: URL-like memory https://example.com/path?x=1 and token edge-url-08.
query: example.com path

query: json key value

text: Edge case 10: Markdown bullet - item A - item B token edge-md-10.
query: markdown bullet item

text: Edge case 11: Numeric extremes 0 1 999999 token edge-num-11.
Edge case 12: Hyphenated-words and snake_case edge-hyphen-12.
query: snake_case

text: Edge case 13: Repeated token alpha alpha alpha alpha edge-repeat-13.
query: alpha
